title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (HQ also in Tel Aviv)
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Includes collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Exceptional match on experience level, expertise (Salesforce, B2B SaaS, high-growth scaling), and role scope. Location is ideal given Tel Aviv HQ and remote-friendly setup aligns with Omri's geographic preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and thought of you immediately—they're building the GTM operational backbone for a 100+ person cloud cost-management platform with dual HQ in Tel Aviv and NYC. Given your 15+ years scaling RevOps in B2B SaaS and deep Salesforce expertise, this hands-on leadership role reporting to their CRO feels like a natural fit, especially with the Tel Aviv connection enabling seamless cross-timezone collaboration.

title: RevOps Manager (Revenue Operations Manager)
description: Platomics, a healthcare SaaS company, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to be the backbone of its revenue engine. You'll design, optimize, and document workflows across sales, marketing, and customer success, build dashboards, analyze funnel metrics, administer the CRM (HubSpot), and support forecasting, territory planning, and quota setting. Certifications in Salesforce, HubSpot, or RevOps are a plus. Remote flexibility across Europe with a competitive salary of €25,000–€31,000 annually.
score_reason: Strong role alignment (RevOps Manager, HubSpot admin, workflow optimization, forecasting) and remote eligibility match Omri's expertise, but healthcare SaaS and junior salary positioning (€25-31k for 15+ year senior executive) create misalignment with his seniority level and typical compensation expectations.
ai_opener: Hi – I came across Platomics' RevOps Manager opening and was impressed by the scope: CRM administration, funnel analytics, and forecasting are core strengths I've built across 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS revenue engines. While my background spans fintech and AI-native GTM, I've optimized similar HubSpot-first workflows and would be curious whether this role might expand toward Head of RevOps scope as the team scales.

title: Senior RevOps Program Manager
description: Engine, a fast-growing travel and fintech platform serving 20,000+ companies, seeks a Senior RevOps Program Manager to own the operational rhythm of its GTM engine. You'll drive the RevOps program portfolio end-to-end—GTM launches, system rollouts, process changes—build cross-functional operating cadence, and partner with Sales Leadership, Finance, and Product. Requires 5+ years in program management, RevOps, sales operations, or GTM operations. Hybrid-hub model with fully remote options available.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise and GTM operational leadership experience. Fintech domain match, senior-level scope, and remote flexibility are ideal; only slight gap is 'program management' focus vs. pure RevOps strategy, but operational rhythm/cross-functional cadence aligns perfectly.
ai_opener: Omri here—spent 15+ years building RevOps engines at scale in B2B SaaS and fintech. Engine's mission to operationalize GTM rhythm across 20k+ companies resonates deeply; I've built exactly that playbook—forecasting infrastructure, GTM launch cadence, cross-functional accountability—and would love to explore how I can accelerate your operational maturity.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a leader in revenue intelligence, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. You'll redesign territory models for global scalability, partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance, and provide dashboards and regional insights. Strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort with ambiguity required. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match for Omri's RevOps expertise and GTM background. Territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and data-driven sales operations are core strengths, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform aligns perfectly with a senior RevOps executive's toolkit and career trajectory.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and GTM strategy. I've rebuilt territory models for hypergrowth, optimized CAC/LTV through data-driven seller productivity, and scaled operations across global teams. Gong's focus on revenue intelligence resonates deeply; I'd bring the same rigor to Territory Strategy & Operations that I've applied to pipeline forecasting and cross-functional alignment at scale.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a B2B SaaS fundraising-automation platform for nonprofits, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or GTM Systems at B2B SaaS, strong SQL/API/workflow skills, and HubSpot administration. Target salary $120,000–$170,000 USD + equity.

ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years architecting revenue engines in B2B SaaS, and Instrumentl's vision of automating fundraising workflows resonates deeply. I've built CRM data models and AI-native GTM stacks that scale, and I'm drawn to your mission of democratizing fundraising for nonprofits. I'd love to explore how my RevOps and systems leadership could accelerate your revenue infrastructure.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, seeks a GTM Engineer to code, ship, and iterate on the internal tools and automations that make its GTM team effective. As the company scales 20x in revenue, you'll replace manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work.

The GTM Engineer role caught my attention because automating manual workflows (lead scoring, attribution, onboarding) is exactly where I've unlocked the most leverage—and doing it with purpose-built tools and AI agents aligns perfectly with how I think about modern RevOps. I'd love to explore whether my background building scalable GTM systems could accelerate your 20x growth.

title: GTM Engineer

ai_opener: Gradient Labs caught my attention—the founding team's pedigree (Monzo, Pleo, Google) and AI-native GTM motion align with where I've been building for the last decade. I've spent my career stitching together fractured sales, marketing, and ops stacks into unified revenue engines, and the challenge of turning AI signals into predictable pipeline at scale is exactly the kind of foundational problem I'd want to own.
